req.title: Reconciliation report (boundary variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests: Daily Reconciliation Report & Incident Management

```python
"""
Test suite for daily reconciliation report requirements:
- System produces daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank
- Non-zero variance shall open an incident
- Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (minimal interface assumed from the SUT)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class IncidentSeverity(Enum):
    LOW = "LOW"
    MEDIUM = "MEDIUM"
    HIGH = "HIGH"
    CRITICAL = "CRITICAL"


class IncidentStatus(Enum):
    OPEN = "OPEN"
    CLOSED = "CLOSED"
    ACKNOWLEDGED = "ACKNOWLEDGED"


@dataclass
class LedgerBalance:
    account_id: str
    balance: Decimal
    currency: str
    as_of_date: date


@dataclass
class CorrespondentBankBalance:
    account_id: str
    balance: Decimal
    currency: str
    as_of_date: date
    bank_reference: str


@dataclass
class ReconciliationEntry:
    account_id: str
    currency: str
    internal_balance: Decimal
    correspondent_balance: Decimal
    variance: Decimal
    report_date: date

    @property
    def has_variance(self) -> bool:
        return self.variance != Decimal("0")


@dataclass
class ReconciliationReport:
    report_id: str
    report_date: date
    generated_at: datetime
    entries: list[ReconciliationEntry] = field(default_factory=list)
    incidents_raised: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    @property
    def total_variance(self) -> Decimal:
        return sum(e.variance for e in self.entries)

    @property
    def has_any_variance(self) -> bool:
        return any(e.has_variance for e in self.entries)


@dataclass
class Incident:
    incident_id: str
    account_id: str
    variance: Decimal
    currency: str
    report_date: date
    severity: IncidentSeverity
    status: IncidentStatus
    opened_at: datetime
    description: str


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

REPORT_DATE = date(2024, 6, 15)
ZERO = Decimal("0")
ONE_CENT = Decimal("0.01")
NEGATIVE_ONE_CENT = Decimal("-0.01")
MAX_THRESHOLD = Decimal("999999999999.99")   # system-defined maximum balance
MIN_THRESHOLD = Decimal("-999999999999.99")  # system-defined minimum balance


@pytest.fixture
def mock_ledger_repo():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_bank_repo():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_incident_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_report_store():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def reconciliation_service(
    mock_ledger_repo,
    mock_bank_repo,
    mock_incident_service,
    mock_report_store,
):
    """
    Constructs the system-under-test with injected dependencies.
    Replace with your actual import, e.g.:
        from reconciliation.service import ReconciliationService
    """
    from reconciliation.service import ReconciliationService  # noqa: PLC0415

    return ReconciliationService(
        ledger_repo=mock_ledger_repo,
        bank_repo=mock_bank_repo,
        incident_service=mock_incident_service,
        report_store=mock_report_store,
    )


def make_ledger(account_id="ACC001", balance="1000.00", currency="USD"):
    return LedgerBalance(
        account_id=account_id,
        balance=Decimal(balance),
        currency=currency,
        as_of_date=REPORT_DATE,
    )


def make_bank(account_id="ACC001", balance="1000.00", currency="USD", ref="BNK-001"):
    return CorrespondentBankBalance(
        account_id=account_id,
        balance=Decimal(balance),
        currency=currency,
        as_of_date=REPORT_DATE,
        bank_reference=ref,
    )


def make_incident(
    account_id="ACC001",
    variance="0.01",
    currency="USD",
    severity=IncidentSeverity.LOW,
):
    return Incident(
        incident_id="INC-001",
        account_id=account_id,
        variance=Decimal(variance),
        currency=currency,
        report_date=REPORT_DATE,
        severity=severity,
        status=IncidentStatus.OPEN,
        opened_at=datetime.now(),
        description=f"Reconciliation variance of {variance} {currency}",
    )


# ===========================================================================
# 1. REPORT GENERATION
# ===========================================================================

class TestReportGeneration:
    """The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report."""

    def test_report_is_generated_for_given_date(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo, mock_report_store
    ):
        """A report object must be created and persisted for every run."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger()]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank()]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert report is not None
        assert report.report_date == REPORT_DATE
        mock_report_store.save.assert_called_once_with(report)

    def test_report_has_unique_id(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger()]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank()]

        report1 = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)
        report2 = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(
            REPORT_DATE + timedelta(days=1)
        )

        assert report1.report_id != report2.report_id

    def test_report_contains_generated_at_timestamp(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger()]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank()]

        before = datetime.utcnow()
        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)
        after = datetime.utcnow()

        assert before <= report.generated_at <= after

    def test_report_includes_entry_for_every_account(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        """Every account present in either source must appear in the report."""
        ledgers = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", "100.00"),
            make_ledger("ACC002", "200.00"),
            make_ledger("ACC003", "300.00"),
        ]
        banks = [
            make_bank("ACC001", "100.00"),
            make_bank("ACC002", "200.00"),
            make_bank("ACC003", "300.00"),
        ]
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = ledgers
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = banks

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        account_ids = {e.account_id for e in report.entries}
        assert account_ids == {"ACC001", "ACC002", "ACC003"}

    def test_report_generated_with_no_accounts_is_empty_but_valid(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = []
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = []

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert report is not None
        assert report.entries == []
        assert report.total_variance == ZERO

    def test_report_fetches_balances_for_correct_date(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = []
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = []

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.assert_called_once_with(REPORT_DATE)
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.assert_called_once_with(REPORT_DATE)

    def test_report_entry_variance_is_ledger_minus_bank(
        self, reconciliation_service, mock_ledger_repo, mock_bank_repo
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "1500.50")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "1499.50")]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)
        entry = report.entries[0]

        assert entry.variance == Decimal("1.00")
        assert entry.internal_balance == Decimal("1500.50")
        assert entry.correspondent_balance == Decimal("1499.50")


# ===========================================================================
# 2. ZERO VARIANCE — NO INCIDENT
# ===========================================================================

class TestZeroVarianceNoIncident:
    """When variance == 0, no incident shall be opened."""

    def test_exact_zero_variance_raises_no_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "1000.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "1000.00")]

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_all_accounts_zero_variance_raises_no_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        ledgers = [make_ledger(f"ACC{i:03}", str(i * 100)) for i in range(1, 6)]
        banks = [make_bank(f"ACC{i:03}", str(i * 100)) for i in range(1, 6)]
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = ledgers
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = banks

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_zero_variance_report_records_no_incidents_raised(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "500.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "500.00")]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert report.incidents_raised == []


# ===========================================================================
# 3. NON-ZERO VARIANCE — INCIDENT MUST BE OPENED
# ===========================================================================

class TestNonZeroVarianceIncident:
    """Any non-zero variance must trigger an incident."""

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "ledger_balance, bank_balance, expected_variance",
        [
            ("1000.01", "1000.00", "0.01"),   # minimal positive variance
            ("1000.00", "1000.01", "-0.01"),  # minimal negative variance
            ("2000.00", "1000.00", "1000.00"),  # large positive variance
            ("1000.00", "2000.00", "-1000.00"),  # large negative variance
            ("0.01", "0.00", "0.01"),           # near-zero ledger
            ("0.00", "0.01", "-0.01"),          # near-zero bank
        ],
    )
    def test_non_zero_variance_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
        ledger_balance,
        bank_balance,
        expected_variance,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", ledger_balance)
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", bank_balance)]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(
            variance=expected_variance
        )

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_incident_references_correct_account(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC999", "100.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC999", "99.99")]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident("ACC999")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        call_kwargs = mock_incident_service.open_incident.call_args
        assert call_kwargs.kwargs.get("account_id") == "ACC999" or (
            len(call_kwargs.args) > 0
            and call_kwargs.args[0].account_id == "ACC999"
        )

    def test_incident_carries_exact_variance_amount(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "1234.56")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "1234.55")]
        incident = make_incident(variance="0.01")
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)
        entry = next(e for e in report.entries if e.account_id == "ACC001")

        assert entry.variance == Decimal("0.01")

    def test_incident_status_is_open(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "500.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "400.00")]
        incident = make_incident(variance="100.00")
        incident.status = IncidentStatus.OPEN
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        opened_incident = mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value
        assert opened_incident.status == IncidentStatus.OPEN

    def test_multiple_variance_accounts_open_separate_incidents(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        ledgers = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", "100.00"),
            make_ledger("ACC002", "200.00"),
            make_ledger("ACC003", "300.00"),  # no variance
        ]
        banks = [
            make_bank("ACC001", "99.99"),
            make_bank("ACC002", "199.99"),
            make_bank("ACC003", "300.00"),
        ]
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = ledgers
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = banks
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident()

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert mock_incident_service.open_incident.call_count == 2

    def test_report_lists_incident_ids_for_all_opened_incidents(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", "100.00"),
            make_ledger("ACC002", "200.00"),
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_bank("ACC001", "99.00"),
            make_bank("ACC002", "199.00"),
        ]
        incident1 = make_incident("ACC001", "1.00")
        incident1.incident_id = "INC-001"
        incident2 = make_incident("ACC002", "1.00")
        incident2.incident_id = "INC-002"
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.side_effect = [incident1, incident2]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert "INC-001" in report.incidents_raised
        assert "INC-002" in report.incidents_raised

    def test_incident_includes_report_date(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "100.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "99.00")]
        incident = make_incident()
        incident.report_date = REPORT_DATE
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = incident

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        opened = mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value
        assert opened.report_date == REPORT_DATE


# ===========================================================================
# 4. BOUNDARY BEHAVIOUR — EXACT THRESHOLDS
# ===========================================================================

class TestBoundaryBehaviour:
    """
    Boundary tests at exact min/max thresholds.

    Threshold definitions:
        ZERO         = Decimal("0")           – boundary between incident / no incident
        ONE_CENT     = Decimal("0.01")        – smallest positive variance (incident)
        NEG_ONE_CENT = Decimal("-0.01")       – smallest negative variance (incident)
        MAX_THRESHOLD = Decimal("999999999999.99") – maximum representable balance
        MIN_THRESHOLD = Decimal("-999999999999.99") – minimum representable balance
    """

    # --- Zero boundary (incident / no-incident boundary) ---

    def test_boundary_zero_variance_no_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Exactly zero variance must NOT open an incident."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "0.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "0.00")]

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_boundary_positive_one_cent_variance_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Variance of +0.01 (one tick above zero) MUST open an incident."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "0.01")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "0.00")]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_boundary_negative_one_cent_variance_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Variance of -0.01 (one tick below zero) MUST open an incident."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", "0.00")]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", "0.01")]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="-0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    # --- Maximum balance threshold ---

    def test_boundary_both_balances_at_max_threshold_zero_variance(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Both sides at MAX with identical value → variance == 0 → no incident."""
        max_str = str(MAX_THRESHOLD)
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", max_str)]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", max_str)]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert report.total_variance == ZERO
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_boundary_ledger_at_max_bank_one_cent_less_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Ledger at MAX, bank at MAX - 0.01 → variance == +0.01 → incident."""
        max_str = str(MAX_THRESHOLD)
        bank_val = MAX_THRESHOLD - ONE_CENT
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", max_str)]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", str(bank_val))]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_boundary_bank_at_max_ledger_one_cent_less_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Bank at MAX, ledger at MAX - 0.01 → variance == -0.01 → incident."""
        max_str = str(MAX_THRESHOLD)
        ledger_val = MAX_THRESHOLD - ONE_CENT
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", str(ledger_val))
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", max_str)]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="-0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    # --- Minimum (most negative) balance threshold ---

    def test_boundary_both_balances_at_min_threshold_zero_variance(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Both sides at MIN with identical value → variance == 0 → no incident."""
        min_str = str(MIN_THRESHOLD)
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", min_str)]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", min_str)]

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        assert report.total_variance == ZERO
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_not_called()

    def test_boundary_ledger_at_min_bank_one_cent_more_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Ledger at MIN, bank at MIN + 0.01 → variance == -0.01 → incident."""
        min_str = str(MIN_THRESHOLD)
        bank_val = MIN_THRESHOLD + ONE_CENT
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", min_str)]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", str(bank_val))]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="-0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_boundary_bank_at_min_ledger_one_cent_more_opens_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Bank at MIN, ledger at MIN + 0.01 → variance == +0.01 → incident."""
        min_str = str(MIN_THRESHOLD)
        ledger_val = MIN_THRESHOLD + ONE_CENT
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", str(ledger_val))
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", min_str)]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(variance="0.01")

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    # --- Maximum possible variance ---

    def test_boundary_max_positive_variance_opens_single_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Ledger at MAX, bank at MIN → maximum possible variance → one incident."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", str(MAX_THRESHOLD))
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_bank("ACC001", str(MIN_THRESHOLD))
        ]
        max_variance = str(MAX_THRESHOLD - MIN_THRESHOLD)
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(
            variance=max_variance
        )

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    def test_boundary_max_negative_variance_opens_single_incident(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
    ):
        """Bank at MAX, ledger at MIN → maximum negative variance → one incident."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_ledger("ACC001", str(MIN_THRESHOLD))
        ]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [
            make_bank("ACC001", str(MAX_THRESHOLD))
        ]
        min_variance = str(MIN_THRESHOLD - MAX_THRESHOLD)
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(
            variance=min_variance
        )

        reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)

        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

    # --- Decimal precision boundary ---

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "ledger_val, bank_val",
        [
            ("1000.001", "1000.000"),  # sub-cent: system must handle correctly
            ("1000.009", "1000.000"),  # sub-cent approaching rounding boundary
        ],
    )
    def test_boundary_sub_cent_variance_is_detected(
        self,
        reconciliation_service,
        mock_ledger_repo,
        mock_bank_repo,
        mock_incident_service,
        ledger_val,
        bank_val,
    ):
        """Sub-cent variances must still be treated as non-zero."""
        mock_ledger_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_ledger("ACC001", ledger_val)]
        mock_bank_repo.get_balances.return_value = [make_bank("ACC001", bank_val)]
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.return_value = make_incident(
            variance=str(Decimal(ledger_val) - Decimal(bank_val))
        )

        report = reconciliation_service.run_daily_reconciliation(REPORT_DATE)
        entry = report.entries[0]

        assert entry.variance != ZERO
        mock_incident_service.open_incident.assert_called_once()

"""
Test suite for daily reconciliation report requirements:
- System produces daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank
- Non-zero variance shall open an incident
- Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (minimal interface assumed from the SUT)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class IncidentSeverity(Enum):
    LOW = "LOW"
    MEDIUM = "MEDIUM"
    HIGH = "HIGH"
    CRITICAL = "CRITICAL"


class IncidentStatus(Enum):
    OPEN = "OPEN"
    CLOSED = "CLOSED"
    ACKNOWLEDGED = "ACKNOWLEDGED"


@dataclass
class LedgerBalance:
    account_id: str
    balance: Decimal
    currency: str
    as_of_date: date


@dataclass
class CorrespondentBankBalance:
    account_id: str
    balance: Decimal
    currency: str
    as_of_date: date
    bank_reference: str


@dataclass
class ReconciliationEntry:
    account_id: str
    currency: str
    internal_balance: Decimal
    correspondent_balance: Decimal
    variance: Decimal
    report_date: date

    @property
    def has_variance(self) -> bool:
        return self.variance != Decimal("0")


@dataclass
class ReconciliationReport:
    report_id: str
    report_date: date
    generated_at: datetime
    entries: list[ReconciliationEntry] = field(default_factory=list)
    incidents_raised: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    @property
    def total_variance(self) -> Decimal:
        return sum(e.variance for e in self.entries)

    @property
    def has_any_variance(self) -> bool:
